description_long: This is a heavily equipped police officer dressed in tactical gear, featuring a dark blue uniform with reinforced padding and a bulletproof vest. The officer wears a full-face gas mask with round eye lenses and a filter, providing respiratory protection in hazardous environments. The uniform includes a tactical vest loaded with pouches, ammunition, and utility items, as well as a utility belt with holstered equipment. On both upper arms, there are visible patches with the Union Jack flag, indicating British affiliation. The officer also carries a radio with an antenna on the back and wears sturdy black combat boots. The overall appearance is that of a specialized urban response or counter-terrorism unit, prepared for high-risk operations.
description: A British tactical police officer in dark blue gear, gas mask, and a vest loaded with equipment and pouches, ready for urban operations.
description_view_0: Front view shows the gas mask, tactical vest with pouches, and utility belt; arms are slightly outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the gas mask profile, radio antenna, and Union Jack patch on the upper arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the vest, radio with antenna, and additional pouches; arms and legs are visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the gas mask profile, utility belt, and another Union Jack patch on the upper arm.
attribute_uniform_type: Tactical police uniform with long-sleeve dark blue shirt and pants, reinforced with body armor, tactical vest, and multiple pouches; features a gas mask and utility belt.
attribute_headgear_style: Full-face black gas mask with round eye lenses and filter, integrated with a helmet.
